steps.title: Introduce the routine parts
steps.content: The clause 'The author-as-juggler performs a routine' is complete. What follows is a list of noun phrases that explain what the routine includes.

steps.title: Use a colon before the list
steps.content: A uses a semicolon before a phrase, not an independent clause. B uses a comma where a formal list introduction is needed. C leaves the list as a fragment. A colon correctly introduces the routine's parts. The answer is D.
